methods.name: Stage-Progression

methods.name: Peer-Median

private.name: Tenna Systems
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Seed), post-money $60M

data.narrative:
Union is a Seed-stage defense & security company that has raised $51.3M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of 10 companies—2 public (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers including Anduril Industries, Shield AI, and Flock Safety—spanning Seed and Series A stages in the same sector.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis uses the $51M total raised as a baseline proxy and applies a 2.5x multiplier typical of Seed-to-next-stage advancement, yielding $128M. Peer-median valuation references 5 same-sector comparables at Seed and Series A stages: Tenna Systems at $60M, NODA AI at $125M, Ares Industries at $150M, Vatn Systems at $300M, and Stark Defence at $500M. The median of this set is $150M, with a range of $60M to $500M.

Triangulating both methods produces a valuation range of $109M (low) to $172M (high), with a median of $139M. The analysis supports a valuation in the $130M–$150M band. Key uncertainties include Union's revenue traction and burn profile relative to peers, the applicability of Series A-weighted comparables to a Seed-stage company, and near-term funding trajectory given the $51.3M already deployed.
